All old imports (`Text`, `TextContent`, `TextList`, `TextListItem`, `TextVariants`) have been removed and are no longer referenced. ## Changes Applied ### Fix 1 — Modal Family Migration **Applied.** - Removed `title` and `titleIconVariant` props from `` and moved them to a new `` child component. - Removed the `actions` prop from `` and moved its content (the `` with buttons) into a new `` child component. - Wrapped the existing body content (the text/list content) in a `` component. - Added `ModalBody`, `ModalHeader`, `ModalFooter` to the import statement from `@patternfly/react-core`. ### Fix 2 — `TextVariants` → `ContentVariants` **Applied.** Removed `TextVariants` from imports. Since the migrated code uses native HTML elements (`

`, `

`, `
`) inside ``, `ContentVariants` is not needed and was not added (no remaining usage). This is cleaner than importing an unused enum. ### Fix 3 — `Text` → `Content` **Applied.** Removed `Text` import. Replaced `` usages with plain `

` elements inside the `` wrapper (which is the idiomatic v6 pattern). ### Fix 4 — `TextContent` → `Content` **Applied.** Removed `TextContent` import. Replaced `` wrapper with `` from `@patternfly/react-core`. Added `Content` to the import statement. ### Fix 5 — `TextList` → `Content` **Applied.** Removed `TextList` import. Replaced `` with a plain `

` element inside the `` wrapper (TextList defaults to rendering a `
`). ### Fix 6 — `TextListItem` → `Content` **Applied.** Removed `TextListItem` import. Replaced `` with plain `
` elements (TextListItem defaults to rendering a `
`), preserving the `className` prop.
